title: Global Product Catalog
subtitle: Manage products available for all businesses
createProductDescription: Create a new product for the TOGO global catalog
productDetailsDescription: Enter product details. SKU must be unique.
skuTip: Use a unique code that clearly identifies the product. Example: COCA-COLA-350ML, WHOLE-MILK-1L
industryTip: Select the correct industry so businesses can easily find the product.
imageTip: Use high-quality images with white or transparent background. Recommended size: 400x400 pixels.
attributesTip: Add relevant attributes like volume, weight, color, flavor, etc. to facilitate search.
superAdminOnly: This section is for Super Administrators only.
productNotFoundDescription: The product you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
warningChangesAffectAll: This product is activated in {count} businesses. Changes you make will affect all of them.
importDescription: Upload products in bulk from a CSV file
csvColumnsDescription: The file must have the columns: sku, name, description, brand, industryId, industryCategoryId, imageUrl
dragDropCsv: Drag and drop your CSV file here
downloadTemplateDescription: Download the template with the correct format
csvFormatInstruction: The file must be in CSV format (comma-separated values)
firstRowHeaders: The first row must contain the column names
requiredFields: SKU, name, and industryId are required fields
skuUpdateNote: If a SKU already exists, the product will be updated
errorsInRows: There are {count} rows with errors. Please correct the file before continuing.
importingDescription: This may take a few moments depending on the number of products
someProductsFailed: Some products could not be imported. Check the details below.
skuDescription: Unique product identifier (barcode or internal reference)
attributesHint: Add attributes like: volume, weight, color, etc.
warningActivatedInBusinesses: This product is activated in {count} businesses. Changes will affect all of them.

empty.adjustFilters: Try adjusting filters or create a new global product.

delete.title: Delete global product?
delete.warning: This product is activated in {count} businesses. Deleting it will remove it from all business catalogs.
delete.notActivated: This product is not activated in any business.
